note: First true local data ingest dry run. Sample data is synthetic-but-realistic; no real public FITS data ingested. Null retained result is expected and correct.
statistical_caveat: CAUTION: sample dataset has only 50 events across 5 GRBs. Random fluctuations at this scale can produce any p-value. Any slope or p-value result here is NOT a scientific claim. This run proves infrastructure works end-to-end only.
